title: equisetum limosum var. uliginosum
intro: Equisetum limosum var. uliginosum, also known as marsh horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetum genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Equisetum limosum var. uliginosum include its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Equisetum limosum var. uliginosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also sometimes used in modern herbal supplements.
